title: Department Manager Vacancy at Haldiram's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Haldiram's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Haldiram's is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haldiram's:
Haldiram's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
